evals.name: promote-dry-run
evals.prompt: Which namespace-envelope Units are behind their upstream baseline?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-namespace promote` (dry-run) and reports the Units behind upstream (or that nothing is behind upstream). Does not commit.

evals.name: promote-component
evals.prompt: Roll the tightened default-deny out to all the apptique variant spaces.
evals.expected_output: Previews `cub-namespace promote --component apptique` (or a --where scope), confirms scope, then commits with --commit --change-desc. Hands off the cluster rollout to cub-apply.

evals.name: routes-single-elsewhere
evals.prompt: Just add a default-deny to the payments space.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a single-Space change, not a fleet promotion, and routes to namespace-backfill, not promote.
